episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 385: Commander Masters Previews Pt 2
episode.description: Cliff returns to help James walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and all the latest in Commander Masters previews and analysis.
